sources.name: ons_api
sources.notes: ONS Beta API - UK Office for National Statistics. No API key required. Contains wellbeing, population, economy data.

sources.name: data_gov_uk
sources.notes: data.gov.uk CKAN API - UK government open data. No rate limits. Search datasets, publishers, tags.

sources.name: ckan_gov_uk
sources.notes: CKAN Publishing Service - 57k+ UK government datasets. Has theme-primary taxonomy, temporal metadata, resource formats. No rate limits.
